description_long: This house is a large, modern residential building set on a spacious green lot with landscaped trees and multiple outdoor amenities. The main structure features a unique polygonal footprint with light-colored exterior walls and a dark, multi-faceted roof. Large windows and glass doors are distributed around the building, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a driveway with two parked cars, a swimming pool with lounge chairs, a trampoline, and a detached garage or outbuilding. The front entryway is prominent, with a wide set of steps leading to double doors, flanked by decorative columns and flags. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor space, geometric lines, and a blend of functional and recreational areas.
description: A modern, polygonal house with large windows, a dark multi-faceted roof, and extensive landscaped grounds featuring a pool, garage, and recreational amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, double doors, decorative columns, and flags, as well as the landscaped lawn and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool area with lounge chairs, the detached garage or outbuilding, and the trampoline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway with two cars, the back of the house, and the pool area to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage/outbuilding, additional lawn space, and the polygonal shape of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Wide steps leading to double doors, flanked by columns and flags, with a small overhang
